name: 轻流
description: QingFlow no-code platform connector for building apps, managing records, and automating workflows.
description_zh: 轻流无代码平台连接器。通过自然语言创建应用、管理表单数据、处理审批流程、查询和导出数据，一站式连接轻流全部能力。
description_en: QingFlow no-code platform connector. Build apps, manage records, automate approval workflows, and export data via natural language.
examples_zh: 帮我在轻流创建一个请假单应用，包含请假类型、开始时间、结束时间、请假天数等字段
查看我工作空间下所有的应用列表
帮你查询请假单中所有待审批的记录
导出资产盘点表的数据为 Excel 文件
examples_en: Create a leave request app in QingFlow with fields like leave type, start time, end time, and days
List all apps in my workspace
Query all pending approval records in the leave form
Export asset inventory data to an Excel file
